examples: For both beef and dairy production,it requires, at least in the beginning, more pastureland.
Increase in pastureland and subsequent overgrazing have resulted in an expansion of savanna.
On certain sites, particularly in South America, savanna formation seems related to frequent cutting and burning of moist forests for pastureland.
The air was fresh as we biked across pastureland grazed by sheep, cows and horses.
The other runways and acres of surrounding pastureland are now covered by more than 10, 000 mobile homes.
